Give everything to Anahata ❤️
Força Barça!
Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help
  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi
  2. Agi

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.Agi

Packages that use Agi
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi
The root package of the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
Manages the conversation history and the injection of just-in-time context.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context.core
Defines the contract for providers that inject just-in-time context into an AI request.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.status
Provides classes for managing and broadcasting agi status events.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.destkop.swing
Provides the core Swing UI components and container orchestration for the standalone Anahata ASI desktop application.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.nb
Core classes for the NetBeans integration of the Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.annotation
Provides the non-intrusive annotation system for visual feedback within the NetBeans IDE.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner
The V4 AST-Guided Structural Refinement Engine.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.polymorphic
Will be enabled when AI providers support polymorphic json objects.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.actions
NetBeans IDE actions for managing project context within AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.chat
Core chat interface components for the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.config
Provides the configuration and metabolic management components for the Anahata Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.gc
Provides UI components for monitoring and managing the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC).
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.input
Provides the high-fidelity user input components for the Anahata Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.status
Provides UI components for monitoring the real-time health and usage of an AGI session.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal
Internal Swing utilities and bridge components for Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text
Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) and logic for surgical file mutations.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines
Provides the next-generation surgical precision engine for line-based text mutations.

  • Uses of Agi in uno.anahata.asi

    Fields in uno.anahata.asi with type parameters of type Agi
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final List<Agi>
    AbstractAsiContainer.activeAgis
    The list of currently active agi sessions managed by this container.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi that return Agi
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Agi
    AbstractAsiContainer.cloneSession(@NonNull Agi agi)
    Authoritatively clones an existing Agi session.
    final Agi
    AbstractAsiContainer.createNewAgi()
    Authoritatively creates, configures, registers, and opens a brand-new Agi session using the user's preferred template.
    final Agi
    AbstractAsiContainer.createNewAgi(AgiConfig config)
    Authoritatively creates, configures, registers, and opens a brand-new Agi session with the provided configuration.
    Agi
    AbstractAsiContainer.importSession(Path path)
    Imports a agi session from an external file.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi that return types with arguments of type Agi
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Agi>
    AbstractAsiContainer.getActiveAgis()
    Gets an unmodifiable list of all active agi sessions.
    List<Agi>
    AbstractAsiContainer.getChildrenAgis(String parentUuid)
    Retrieves all active Agi sessions spawned by a specific parent.
    List<Agi>
    AbstractAsiContainer.getOpenAgis()
    Gets an unmodifiable list of all agi sessions that are currently logically open in the host UI.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi with parameters of type Agi
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.autoSaveSession(Agi agi, String reason)
    Performs an automatic backup of the session using Kryo serialization.
    Agi
    AbstractAsiContainer.cloneSession(@NonNull Agi agi)
    Authoritatively clones an existing Agi session.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.close(@NonNull Agi agi)
    Authoritatively requests that the specified agi session's UI tab or window be closed.
    protected void
    AbstractAsiContainer.configureNewAgi(Agi agi)
    Hook invoked to perform initial post-birth configuration of a new Agi.
    RequestConfig
    AsiContainerPreferences.createRequestConfig(@NonNull Agi agi)
    Creates a deep-cloned instance of the RequestConfig template, bound to the specified Agi session.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.dispose(Agi agi)
    Permanently disposes of a agi session, shutting it down and moving its serialized file to the 'disposed' directory.
    abstract Object
    AbstractAsiContainer.getUI(Agi agi)
    Retrieves the platform-specific UI component associated with an Agi session.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.manualSaveSession(Agi agi)
    Manually saves the session to the 'saved' directory.
    protected abstract void
    AbstractAsiContainer.onAgiClosed(Agi agi)
    Hook invoked when a session has been logically closed.
    protected abstract void
    AbstractAsiContainer.onAgiOpened(Agi agi)
    Hook invoked when a session has been logically opened.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.onAgiRegistered(Agi agi)
    Hook invoked whenever a session enters the active pool.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.onAgiUnregistered(Agi agi)
    Hook invoked whenever a session is removed from the active pool.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.open(@NonNull Agi agi)
    authoritatively requests that the specified agi session be opened and brought to the front in the host UI.
    private void
    AbstractAsiContainer.registerInternal(Agi agi)
    Internal logic for session pooling and common hook invocation.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.registerSession(Agi agi)
    Registers a newly spawned or cloned Agi session with this container.
    private void
    AbstractAsiContainer.saveSessionTo(Agi agi, Path dir)
    Serializes and saves a agi session to a specific directory using Kryo.
    void
    AbstractAsiContainer.unregister(Agi agi)
    Unregisters a agi session from this configuration and triggers host-aware cleanup hooks.

    Method
    Description
    static Map<Agi,Integer>
    FilesContextActionLogic.getSessionFileCounts(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, boolean recursive)
    Returns V2 resource counts for each open session within a folder or package.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.nb.annotation with parameters of type Agi
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    FilesContextActionLogic.addRecursively(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive)
    Adds a file or folder's contents to the specified agi context recursively.
    private static void
    FilesContextActionLogic.collectAdditions(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive, List<Path> toRegister, Set<org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> fosToRefresh)
    Recursively collects files that need to be added to the context.
    private static void
    FilesContextActionLogic.collectRemovals(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive, List<String> ids, Set<org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> fos)
    Recursively collects resource IDs that need to be removed from the context.
    private static int
    FilesContextActionLogic.countFilesInContext(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi agi, boolean recursive)
    Internal counter for files belonging to a folder that are in context.
    private static List<String>
    AnahataAnnotationLogic.getProvidingProviders(Agi agi, org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo)
    Locates the names of all active providers for a project.
    static boolean
    FilesContextActionLogic.isInContext(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi agi)
    Checks if a specific file is currently present in a session's V2 context.
    static void
    FilesContextActionLogic.removeRecursively(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, Agi targetAgi, boolean recursive)
    Removes a file or folder's contents from the specified V2 context.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Formats file name annotations using parentheses.

    Builds the descriptive HTML tooltip for the Anahata badge.
    static List<Integer>
    AnahataAnnotationLogic.calculateSessionTotals(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, AnahataAnnotationLogic.NodeType nodeType, List<Agi> activeAgis)
    Calculates the context presence totals for each active session with high-resolution timing.

    Method
    Description

    Enables the project context provider for all selected projects in the given agi.

    RemoveProjectFromContextAction.removeProjectsFromAgi(Agi agi, List<org.netbeans.api.project.Project> projects)
    Disables the project context provider for all selected projects in the given agi.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    OpenAiCompatibleMessage(Agi agi, String modelId)
    Constructs a new, empty compatible message for streaming.
     
    OpenAiCompatibleMessage(Agi agi, String modelId, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode choiceNode, OpenAiCompatibleResponse response, OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle reasoningStyle, String reasoningFieldName, List<String> reasoningTags)

    Environment-specific logic to visually focus or select the UI component associated with the given session.
